hero.title: Collaborate
hero.description: I'm a software developer with a mathematical background, passionate about AI, open source, and knowledge sharing. Let's build something together.

journey.title: Professional Journey
journey.description: Over a decade of experience across academia, startups, and product teams — from teaching mathematics to shipping AI-powered products.

milestones.description: Building intelligent learning systems powered by LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agentic workflows.
AI consulting and full-stack development for startups — from conversational agents to image generation platforms.
Developed AI avatar systems, real-time video pipelines, and open-source tooling with Python, React, and Three.js.
Built blockchain-based platforms and scalable web applications using React, NestJS, and cloud infrastructure.
Taught mathematics, linear algebra, and calculus. Mentored students in mathematical modeling and computational thinking.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: A selection of projects I've built or led — spanning AI, full-stack development, and workflow automation.

project_1.title: Plixiq
project_1.description: Multi-tenant AI platform that unifies LLM access for teams and businesses.
project_1.context: Companies need to experiment with multiple LLM providers without managing separate API keys, billing, and access controls for each team member.
project_1.problem: LLM adoption in teams is fragmented — each developer signs up for their own accounts, costs are invisible, and there's no unified way to manage models, usage limits, or prompt routing.
project_1.solution: Built a multi-tenant platform with LiteLLM as the unified model gateway, Next.js frontend, and Python backend. Teams get a single dashboard to manage models, track costs, set usage limits per user, and route prompts to the best provider automatically.

project_2.title: Morpheus
project_2.description: AI image generation platform enabling users to create custom images from text prompts and reference photos.
project_2.context: A creative tooling startup needed a production-ready image generation platform that could handle custom models and reference-based generation.
project_2.problem: Existing tools lacked the ability to combine text prompts with reference photos for consistent brand imagery, and had no API for integration into existing workflows.
project_2.solution: Built an end-to-end platform with FastAPI backend orchestrating Stable Diffusion pipelines, a React frontend with real-time preview, and a REST API for programmatic access.

project_3.title: Digital Human / Zippy
project_3.description: AI-powered 3D avatars with real-time speech, facial animation, and conversational capabilities.
project_3.context: A research project at Monadical exploring the intersection of LLMs, speech synthesis, and 3D rendering for interactive digital humans.
project_3.problem: Creating a convincing real-time digital human requires synchronizing speech generation, lip-sync, facial expressions, and conversational AI with low latency.
project_3.solution: Integrated OpenAI GPT for conversation, Whisper for speech recognition, ElevenLabs for voice synthesis, and Three.js for 3D rendering — all connected through a real-time WebSocket pipeline.

project_4.title: CREARIA Agent
project_4.description: WhatsApp-based customer service agent using RAG and tool orchestration for automated support.
project_4.context: A company needed to automate their customer support on WhatsApp while maintaining the quality and accuracy of human agents.
project_4.problem: Traditional chatbots fail when questions require access to specific business knowledge or when they need to perform actions like checking order status or scheduling appointments.
project_4.solution: Built a RAG-powered agent with MCP tool orchestration that can search internal documentation, access business systems, and handle multi-turn conversations — all through the WhatsApp API.

project_5.title: ROCKET CODE
project_5.description: Monorepo-based workflow automation platform for development teams with shared component libraries.
project_5.context: A growing development agency needed to standardize their tooling, share components across projects, and automate repetitive development workflows.
project_5.problem: Each project had its own setup, dependencies, and component implementations — leading to inconsistency, duplicated work, and slow onboarding for new team members.
project_5.solution: Designed an NX monorepo architecture with shared React component libraries, NestJS microservices, and automated CI/CD pipelines. New projects could be scaffolded in minutes with consistent patterns.

community.title: Free Study Community
community.description: Every Wednesday at 8:00 PM (Colombia, UTC-5), I host a free study group on mathematics, software engineering, and AI. Sessions in Spanish — everyone is welcome.
